title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/image/v5 to v5.31.0

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/image (github.com/containers/image/v5)</summary>

### [`v5.31.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/image/releases/tag/v5.31.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/image/compare/v5.30.1...v5.31.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump c/storage to v1.53.0, c/image to v5.30.0, and then to v5.30.1-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2327](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2327)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 to v2.15.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2333](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2333)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/cli to v25.0.4+incompatible by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2334](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2334)
-   Move to a tagged version of docker/docker by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2336](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2336)
-   fix(deps): update go-openapi packages to v0.23.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2337](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2337)
-   Update to Go 1.20 by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2340](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2340)
-   chore(deps): update module github.com/go-jose/go-jose/v3 to v3.0.3 \[security] by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2338](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2338)
-   chore(deps): update module gopkg.in/go-jose/go-jose.v2 to v2.6.3 \[security] by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2339](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2339)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/ocicrypt to v1.1.10 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2341](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2341)
-   chore(deps): update module google.golang.org/protobuf to v1.33.0 \[security] by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2344](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2344)
-   Add support for Docker HealthConfig.StartInterval (v25.0.0+) by [@​migesok](https://togithub.com/migesok) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2345](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2345)
-   Fix an unintentionally-added dependency on Go 1.21 by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2343](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2343)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/docker/docker to v25.0.5+incompatible by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2348](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2348)

-   fix(deps): update module github.com/ulikunitz/xz to v0.5.12 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2366](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2366)

-   Fix a http.response.Body leak on a permission error by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2363](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2363)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.8 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2372](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2372)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbauerster/mpb/v8 to v8.7.3 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2373](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2373)
-   use containers/storage/pkg/fileutils/(Exists,Lexists)  by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2375](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2375)

-   Update module github.com/docker/docker to v26.0.2+incompatible \[SECURITY] by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2381](https://togithub.com/containers/image/pull/2381)
